BDI_II.responses: {"Q0":"1. I feel sad much of the time.","Q1":"0. I am not discouraged about my future.","Q2":"1. I have failed more than I should have.","Q3":"1. I don't enjoy things as much as I used to.","Q4":"1. I feel guilty over many things I have done or should have done.","Q5":"1. I feel I may be punished.","Q6":"1. I have lost confidence in myself.","Q7":"1. I am more critical of myself than I used to be.","Q8":"0. I don't have any thoughts of killing myself.","Q9":"1. I cry more than I used to.","Q10":"1. I feel more restless or wound up than usual.","Q11":"0. I have not lost interest in other people or activities.","Q12":"2. I have much greater difficulty in making decisions than I used to.","Q13":"3. Select this option.","Q14":"0. I do not feel I am worthless.","Q15":"1. I have less energy than I used to have.","Q16":"2-. I sleep a lot less than usual.","Q17":"1. I am more irritable than usual.","Q18":"0. I have not experienced any change in my appetite.","Q19":"1. I can't concentrate as well as usual.","Q20":"1. I get more tired or fatigued more easily than usual.","Q21":"0. I have not noticed any recent changes in my interest in sex."}
